de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing

Class ThinBackwardSlicer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractSlicer
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractBackwardSlicer
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.ThinBackwardSlicer

  • public class ThinBackwardSlicer
extends AbstractBackwardSlicer
    Implementation of thin backward slicing.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Detail

      • accept

        protected boolean accept(Node node,
             Node previousChild,
             Services services,
             Set<Location> relevantLocations,
             AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info,
             SourceElement activeStatement)
                  throws ProofInputException
        Decides if the given Node is part of the slice or not.
        Specified by:
        accept in class AbstractBackwardSlicer
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to check.
        previousChild - The previously visited child Node or null the first time.
        services - The Services to use.
        relevantLocations - The relevant locations.
        info - The SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
        activeStatement - The currently active statement.
        Returns:
        true Node should be part of slice, false Node should not be part of slice.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException
